site.title: Agent Ops Cockpit · AOC Map
site.description: Graph-first visualization layer for Agent Ops Cockpit. Use this microsite to browse project flows, architecture maps, agent routes, task views, and other minimal visual explanations.

collections.title: Architecture
collections.description: System structure, boundaries, core data flow, and major implementation surfaces.

collections.title: Agents
collections.description: Specialist roles, subagents, orchestration routes, wrappers, and runtime behavior.

collections.title: Tasks
collections.description: Taskmaster flows, dependencies, delivery plans, and work decomposition.

collections.title: Mind
collections.description: Insight, provenance, compaction, observer/reflector paths, and memory views.

collections.title: Ops
collections.description: Operational runbooks, session lifecycle pages, troubleshooting surfaces, and control flows.

collections.title: Dashboards
collections.description: Visual summaries, fleet views, status boards, and rollups derived from repo state.

collections.title: Explainers
collections.description: Narrative visual walkthroughs for humans and agents who need fast orientation.

collections.title: Research
collections.description: Investigations, comparisons, spikes, and references captured as visual notes.

collections.title: Other
collections.description: Everything else that benefits from a browsable visual artifact.
